tagline: Find your people before the moment passes.

designSystem.style: Modern social-networking design with vibrant purple-violet brand identity, soft layered surfaces, expressive activity cards with color-coded pivot states, and a conversational bottom-sheet creation flow. Combines urgency cues (countdown timers, expiry badges) with warmth (avatar bubbles, emoji activity icons) to make spontaneous socializing feel safe and approachable.

screens: Discover — Browse nearby live pivots with activity filter pills, expiry timers, energy badges, and connect/like actions
Create Pivot (modal) — 3-step bottom-sheet flow: choose activity → set social energy → configure duration and preview summary
Matches — Active pivot conversations with auto-expiring chat, meet-zone banner, safety indicators, and micro-community tracker
Profile — Personal stats, recent activity log, safety/verification settings, and light/dark theme toggle
